notes: Implemented Stage 3 defense placement and combat resolution on top of Stage 1-2. Added four functional defense archetypes: Paint Can Pendulum (trap), Shotgun Mount (weapon), Dog (pet), and Roomba (smart tech), including ScriptableObject assets and prefabs. Upgraded placement controller with click/touch placement validation, defense palette UI with costs, placement indicator, insufficient-scrap feedback, category constraints, and per-frame defense ticking. Extended combat logic for trap consumption, weapon targeting, pet chase/knockback/stun, roomba patrol/detour, kill rewards, damage popups, and alien death visuals. Updated scene scaffold wiring and GameManager to load multi-defense data. Verification: 0 compile errors, EditMode 10/10 passing, PlayMode 6/6 passing, GameScene play session confirmed floor rendering (151 nodes), wave progression/spawn activity (18 total), integrity reduction to 0 when aliens leak, and zero runtime console errors.
